name: Vincent - Brave Search
description: Brave Search integration via Vincent CLI — web and news search with x402 automatic credit replenishment.
review: Brave Search wrapper via Vincent CLI with x402 auto-replenishment as the key differentiator over native OpenClaw web_search. Part of the well-maintained Vincent AI skill suite.
notes: Requires @vincentai/cli npm package. x402 credits consumed per search.
